content.query:
/*============================================================
  Watermark control table
============================================================*/
IF OBJECT_ID('config.WatermarkControl', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE config.WatermarkControl;
GO

CREATE TABLE config.WatermarkControl
(
    WatermarkId         INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    ProjectName         VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    LoadType            VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,     -- FULL / INCREMENTAL
    TargetTable         VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,     -- patients, visits, customers...
    WatermarkColumn     VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,     -- visit_date, order_date, etc.
    LastProcessedValue  DATETIME2    NULL,
    LastRunId           VARCHAR(100) NULL,
    LastUpdatedAtUtc    DATETIME2    NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO
